---
title: Alliance resources
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
---

:::{layout="[[4, 4, 4], [4, 4, 4]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Wiki front page](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Technical_documentation){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Start here to use the wiki]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Slurm jobs](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Running_jobs){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[How to submit jobs]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[System status](https://status.alliancecan.ca/){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Status of Alliance clusters]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Support](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Technical_support){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Get help with the clusters]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Other training](https://explora.alliancecan.ca/){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Search all our training]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Service catalogue](https://www.alliancecan.ca/en/services){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Portal to Alliance services]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::
